channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Russia launches deadly, massive ballistic missile attack in Kyiv, Ukraine
item.description: One person was killed and 16 others wounded in the overnight Russian attack on Kyiv, local authorities said.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 FIFA Men's World Cup today
item.description: Spain will face Argentina in the 2026 FIFA Men's World Cup final match on July 19. Here's how and when to watch the soccer game.

item.title: Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in US after British prosecutors file new charges
item.description: The controversial influencers were arrested in Miami on Saturday evening, according to the Crown Prosecution Service.

item.title: WATCH: Texas officer races to rescue man from burning car
item.description: A police officer is being hailed as a hero after saving a man trapped in a burning vehicle.
